RADAR Composite (all sites)
Audio▾
Home Location▾
Where the HOME button snaps to.
Display▾
Labels overlay puts city names and roads on top of the radar so they stay readable through reflectivity. Boost brightness to make them pop more.
NEXRAD data is ~1km native resolution — pixelation at high zoom is real. Smoothing softens the edges visually.
Swaps the accent color used across panels, buttons, and the audible alert area ring.
Radar▾
Alert Styling▾
Per-event color and assigned alarm sound.
0% = outlines only · 100% = default · 300% = heavy fill
Sounds▾
Overlays▾
Upload a zipped shapefile (.zip containing .shp, .dbf, .shx, .prj). City limits, your service area, etc.
Hazard Icons▾
Replace any default storm-cell icon with your own. SVG is best (scales cleanly), PNG/JPG also work. Square images render best at ~22px.
Audible Alert Area▾
Only play sounds for alerts whose polygon comes within this radius of a point. Leave blank to sound all alerts on the map (every storm in the country).
Push Notifications▾
Sends alert notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh — install the ntfy app, subscribe to the same topic name on your phone, and alerts within the audible area show up as push notifications. No account required; the topic name is your only secret. Pick something nobody could guess.
NWS Chat▾
Click the NWS button in the topbar to open NWS Chat in a popup window using the position preset chosen here. Slack blocks iframe embedding for security, so a popup is the only way to keep it side-by-side with StormLab.
Spotter Log▾
Floating bottom-center panel for timestamped storm observations during ops. Drag the header to move, drag the bottom-right corner to resize, opacity slider in the header. Optional mirror to ntfy.sh so notes hit your phone or any other subscriber.
Config▾
NORAD▾
Authorized terminal access to the W.O.P.R. (War Operation Plan Response) at Cheyenne Mountain. Strategic simulation system. Authorized personnel only.
Alerts in Audible Area
Click to enable alarm audio in this browser session

First-run setup
Audible Alert Area
To filter alerts, sounds, and notifications to your area, set a center point and radius. Without this, you won't receive any alerts — the area is opt-in.
or enter coordinates
You can always change this later in CONFIG → Audible Alert Area.
